mapper.select: select id, name, prefix, number_type, digit_length, suffix, start_value, reset_rule, current_value, last_reset_key, is_enabled, apply_form_field, usage_scope, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remarks, is_deleted from sys_serial_number where id = #{id} and is_deleted = '0'
mapper.update:
update sys_serial_number
name = #{name},
prefix = #{prefix},
number_type = #{numberType},
digit_length = #{digitLength},
suffix = #{suffix},
start_value = #{startValue},
reset_rule = #{resetRule},
current_value = #{currentValue},
last_reset_key = #{lastResetKey},
is_enabled = #{isEnabled},
apply_form_field = #{applyFormField},
usage_scope = #{usageScope},
create_by = #{createBy},
create_time = #{createTime},
update_by = #{updateBy},
update_time = #{updateTime},
remarks = #{remarks},
update_time = now(),
where id = #{id}
mapper.delete: update sys_serial_number set is_deleted = '1', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now(), remarks = CONCAT(remarks, '|', #{updateBy}, '删除', NOW()) where id = #{id}

update sys_serial_number set is_deleted = '1', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now(), remarks = CONCAT(remarks, '|', #{updateBy}, '删除', NOW()) where id in
#{id}

update.foreach:
update sys_serial_number
name = #{item.name},
prefix = #{item.prefix},
number_type = #{item.numberType},
digit_length = #{item.digitLength},
suffix = #{item.suffix},
start_value = #{item.startValue},
reset_rule = #{item.resetRule},
current_value = #{item.currentValue},
last_reset_key = #{item.lastResetKey},
is_enabled = #{item.isEnabled},
apply_form_field = #{item.applyFormField},
usage_scope = #{item.usageScope},
create_by = #{item.createBy},
create_time = #{item.createTime},
update_by = #{item.updateBy},
update_time = #{item.updateTime},
remarks = #{item.remarks},
update_time = now(),
where id = #{item.id}
